dashboard_id: healthcare/Deviation_ Charting Actual to Target Values
problem: This bar chart's values range from 4.50 to 7.90, none of which approach zero. If the axis does not start at zero, differences between values will appear visually exaggerated.
fix: Set the Y-axis to start at zero (right-click axis -> Edit Axis -> Fixed -> 0), or switch to a chart type where this is not a concern.
